question_en: What is volatility treated as in this chapter?
choices_en: Proof that the thesis has failed
A sign that fiat is stable
explanation_en: The chapter says volatility belongs to real-time transition rather than serving as a refutation of the thesis.
explanation_ko: 이 장은 변동성을 논지의 반증이 아니라 실제 전환의 일부로 본다.
